title: Syzygium phillyreoides
taxonomy: Syzygium phillyreoides is classified in the family Myrtaceae. This family is a part of the order Myrtales and the clade Rosids. The plant is further classified under the order Myrtales, which includes various families of flowering plants. The Myrtaceae family contains around 3,500 species of plants, many of which are native to Australia. Syzygium phillyreoides is one of the species within this family.
